mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_id, n.class_id, n.member_id, n.title, n.content, n.confirm_yn, n.target, n.status, n.created_at, n.updated_at, c.class_name, NVL(t.teacher_name, '-') AS writer_name, cf.confirmed_yn FROM notice n LEFT JOIN class c ON c.class_id = n.class_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.teacher_id = n.member_id LEFT JOIN notice_confirm cf ON cf.notice_id = n.notice_id AND cf.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE
ORDER BY n.notice_id DESC

SELECT n.notice_id, n.class_id, n.member_id, n.title, n.content, n.confirm_yn, n.target, n.status, n.created_at, n.updated_at, c.class_name, NVL(t.teacher_name, '-') AS writer_name, cf.confirmed_yn FROM notice n LEFT JOIN class c ON c.class_id = n.class_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.teacher_id = n.member_id LEFT JOIN notice_confirm cf ON cf.notice_id = n.notice_id AND cf.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE
AND n.confirm_yn = 1 AND NVL(cf.confirmed_yn, 0) = 0 ORDER BY n.notice_id DESC

SELECT n.notice_id, n.class_id, n.member_id, n.title, n.content, n.confirm_yn, n.target, n.status, n.created_at, n.updated_at, c.class_name, NVL(t.teacher_name, '-') AS writer_name, cf.confirmed_yn FROM notice n LEFT JOIN class c ON c.class_id = n.class_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.teacher_id = n.member_id LEFT JOIN notice_confirm cf ON cf.notice_id = n.notice_id AND cf.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( notice_id, class_id, member_id, title, content, confirm_yn, target, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{classId}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{confirmYn}, #{target}, 'Y', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, confirm_yn = #{confirmYn}, target = #{target}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO notice_confirm c USING dual ON (c.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND c.member_id = #{memberId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.confirmed_yn = 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (confirm_id, member_id, notice_id, confirmed_yn) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(confirm_id), 0) + 1 FROM notice_confirm), #{memberId}, #{noticeId}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT ano, pno, uploadpath, filename, filetype, attacher, regdate FROM attach WHERE pno = #{noticeId} ORDER BY ano
